text:
By 2028, $GOOGL could be generating ~$600M in profit per day. 

That’s roughly what Google Search was making per day in 2025.

Iran reportedly struck the oil tanker “Skylight” near Strait of Hormuz escalating tensions around one of the world’s most critical shipping corridors.

Maersk (world’s largest shipping company) is now suspending all shipments through the strait which is a move reflecting the mounting security concerns in the region.

$NVDA is partnering with telecom companies to build 6G networks designed to support large-scale AI use cases.

As AI moves to the edge (robotics, autonomous systems, real-time inference) latency and bandwidth become constraints that 5G wasn’t built to handle.

$GOOGL is testing a new version of HTTPS in Chrome designed to protect the internet from future quantum computer hacks.

They’re working with $NET on live trials with plans to roll it out more broadly by 2027.

Link below to catch the full episode:

piped.video/COH33kRCKrg?si=hyHE…

FUTURUM EQUITIES PODCAST EPISODE #32

Daniel & I dove into five big themes:
• Is AI taking your job? 
• Where we’re buying the dip
• What I’m doing with $EOSE
• Earnings reactions: $NVDA, $SNOW, $MELI, $HIMS, $CIFR, $RKLB, $IONQ, $AXON, $DOCN
• What Jack Dorsey’s 40% layoff means for seat-based models: $MSFT, $NOW, $WDAY, $CRM

Plus a 10-minute live Q&A at the end.

$ZETA is a really interesting name to track as the market punishes all software stocks in a doomsday scenario.

I get a lot of messages asking whether LLMs will replace their software but the better question is whether identity data becomes more or less valuable as AI proliferates.

I think the answer is more because as marketing shifts to true one-to-one personalization, deterministic identity becomes the bottleneck since AI can write copy and suggest audiences but it can’t know that a specific person opened three emails, browsed two products and is likely to convert in the next 48 hours.

So If you're buying Zeta then your thesis is that the SuperGraph becomes more valuable as cookies die, privacy regulations tighten and AI makes generic targeting commoditized.

Athena going GA in Q1 2026 is the next catalyst.

Fibonacci levels help you see where momentum pauses by mapping potential areas of support & resistance using ratios from the Fib sequence.  

I find them useful because strong trends often consolidate at these levels before continuing higher & this list reflects names consolidating between the 0.382  & 0.618 extension levels.

Highest "Retail Investor" Sentiment basket of stocks, crashing from its cycle peak (10/6) -22.5%

Just to put a little of this into perspective, if you are down -22.5% you need to be up +29.03% in order to break even. 

Then let’s say that you, the Hedgeye follower, are up +5% since October you are ahead of the “Retail” community by +35.5%. If you are up +10% then you are ahead by +41.9%, up +15% ahead +48.4%, up 20% ahead by +54.8%.

Up +41.9% since October? Now that, is how you compound your wealth.

Process Compounds. Narratives     Don’t.  @HedgeyeAI 

“The market is never wrong — opinions often are.” -Jesse Livermore

I was asked a good question about how I manage stock positions during earnings season.

You can’t avoid every earnings grenade.

You can only determine how much shrapnel you take.

My framework:

1.Strong fundamentals + signal strength → maintain position size

2.Stock runs up on competitor reports → trim into strength

3.New negative info changes original thesis  → fold, do not stayed married to the position

While you can’t win them all, how you risk manage the position going into and out of earnings makes all the difference.

Wells Fargo projects hyperscaler data center capacity will double by the end of next year, rising from 49GW in 2025 to 98GW in 2027, with Microsoft, Amazon and Alphabet accounting for ~75% of capacity.
